uses: best-in-slot helmet for almost every caster build
also used as a generic +skills/stats/life/mana helm for non-casters
demand_drivers: universal — almost every build wants Shako
one of the first high-value items new players target
steady demand across all ladder ages
supply_notes: drops from Mephisto, Diablo, Baal, and many other monsters
relatively common for a unique — steady supply
dup concerns in legacy D2:LOD era, less relevant in D2R

important_rolls_or_variants: defense is the only variable roll (minor price difference)
ethereal Shako is common — only cosmetic, no durability use for helm
segment_sensitivity: ladder vs non-ladder: moderate price difference
early ladder: higher price, drops quickly
known_model_risks: Shako is relatively easy to model — low roll variance
high trade volume gives stable VWAP
defense roll has negligible impact on price
ethereal vs non-eth may have slight price difference

traderie.notes: High volume. Low roll variance makes this a good candidate for basic Traderie pricing.

reddit.notes: Use for demand, sentiment, confusion points, source discovery, and item-profile updates.

rmt_sites.notes: External cash-market signal only. Do not present as a recommendation to buy or sell.

research_notes.note: Initial draft profile. Shako is the most liquid common unique. Good candidate for basic Traderie pricing model.

open_questions: Is Shako volume high enough across all four segments?
Does ethereal Shako trade at a discount, or is it effectively the same price?
Should Shako be the first non-rune item priced via the existing pipeline?
